characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, long blonde hair. She has dark eyeliner and a casual, slightly tired appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Oversized grey sweatshirt with 'NEW YORK 85' printed in black.
characters.demeanor: Initially frustrated and hesitant, becoming more confident and happy as she learns.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलना इतना मुश्किल क्यों है? [Why is speaking English so difficult?]
Character B says: What's your name? [What's your name?]
Character A says: My name is Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: How are you? [How are you?]
Character A says: I am fine, thank you. [I am fine, thank you.]
Character B says: Can you speak English? [Can you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I... [Yes, I...]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं। कहिए: "Yes, I can". [No problem. Say: "Yes, I can".]
Character A says: Yes, I can. [Yes, I can.]
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: I... twenty-four...? [I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: Say: "I am 24 years old". [Say: "I am 24 years old".]
Character A says: I am 24 years old. [I am 24 years old.]
Character A says: मैं रोज़ ऐसे ही practice कैसे करूँ? [How do I practice like this every day?]
Character B says: बस Supernova app डाउनलोड करो। [Just download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: मैं अभी Supernova डाउनलोड करती हूँ! [I'll download Supernova right now!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the relatable problem of struggling with English while doing daily chores.
- Demonstrates the interactive, non-judgmental AI tutor experience.
- Ends with a clear, enthusiastic call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलना इतना मुश्किल क्यों है?
What's your name?
My name is Nesly.
How are you?
I am fine, thank you.
Can you speak English?
Yes, I...
कोई बात नहीं। कहिए: "Yes, I can".
Yes, I can.
How old are you?
I... twenty-four...?
Say: "I am 24 years old".
I am 24 years old.
मैं रोज़ ऐसे ही practice कैसे करूँ?
बस Supernova app डाउनलोड करो।
मैं अभी Supernova डाउनलोड करती हूँ!

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides the final brand impression.
- Directs users to the app stores for download.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
